news_title: WF International Limited Announces Closing of Initial Public Offering
summary: WF International  (NASDAQ: WXM), a company specializing in HVAC systems, floor heating, and water purification solutions, has successfully completed itsInitial Public Offering (IPO). The company offered1,400,000 ordinary sharesat$4.00 per share, raising total gross proceeds of$5.6 millionbefore deducting underwriting costs and expenses.Trading of WXM shares commenced on theNasdaq Capital Market on April 1, 2025. The underwriters, The Benchmark Company and Axiom Capital Management, have a 30-day option to purchase an additional210,000 sharesat the offering price, representing 15% of the sold shares.
